name: vulca
description: Agent-native visual control for discovery, prompt structure, semantic layers, redraw workflows, and cultural evaluation.

interface.shortDescription: Control visual projects with discovery, structured prompts, layers, and evaluation.
interface.longDescription: Vulca turns fuzzy visual intent into reviewable creative artifacts: discovery notes, direction cards, structured prompts, semantic layers, provider-routed generation, redraw workflows, and L1-L5 cultural evaluation. Redraw and inpaint tools are advanced workflows and should remain explicit opt-in.
defaultPrompt: Run Vulca visual discovery for this visual idea and produce direction cards.
Decompose this image into semantic layers and summarize what can be edited.
Evaluate this generated image against the selected cultural tradition and intent.
